gigapan.name: Orland tower, and Ice Box Market, Orland California (l13)
gigapan.description:
We discovered Orland on our drive to my Uncle's funeral in Yoncalla in August of 2004.

The Ice Box appears like a conventional convenience store, but something was different.

They have a sandwich counter, and the sandwiches were amazing.  Huge sandwiches, inexpensive, they hit the spot.

This last trip I stopped in.  The old owners were not there.  A new person took over about six months ago.  I asked if the sandwiches were still good.  

"Let me put it this way, when we started we were selling four or five sandwiches a day, now we do 80."
